channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Nothing’s modular CMF Headphone Pro are down to their lowest price to date
item.description: Over the past several years, Nothing’s budget-centric subsidiary, CMF, has built a reputation for producing attractive, inexpensive products with features often reserved for gadgets that cost twice the price. The CMF Headphone Pro — the company’s first pair of over-ear wireless headphones — fit precisely in that lane, especially now that they’re on sale at […]...

item.title: Samsung is clearing stock on its best-selling TVs — stunningly low prices on 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs
item.description: Samsung is clearing stock on its best-selling TVs to make room for its new 2026 TVs, which means you can score record-low prices on older model 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs.

item.title: On a vu le BYD Song Ultra : le SUV électrique moins cher qu’une Tesla qui se recharge aussi vite qu’une voiture essence
item.description: Avec sa batterie Blade 2.0, sa recharge en 5 minutes et un prix plancher de 20 000 euros en Chine, le BYD Song Ultra EV est le premier SUV de la série Dynasty à embarquer la technologie de recharge Flash. Nous sommes allés le découvrir en concession en Chine.

item.title: The Stars My Destination is classic proto-cyberpunk
item.description: This might feel like a somewhat obvious recommendation to some, but it flew under my radar until now. Alfred Bester's The Stars My Destination (originally published as Tiger! Tiger! in the UK) is a 1956 sci-fi novel that some have cited as a precursor to cyberpunk. It's a work I admit I have some conflicted […]

item.title: I took the Vivo X300 Ultra to Hong Kong, and it proved teleconverter lenses aren't just a gimmick
item.description: I spent a day with the Vivo X300 Ultra to see if its incredible photography kit is worth the money.

item.title: 'A wonderful show for any rocket enthusiast': Blue Origin shows SpaceX it can do reusable rockets too by landing 'Never Tell Me The Odds'
item.description: The third New Glenn launch has been a success, and it's going to mean wider access to mobile satellite communications.

item.title: Avec le air fryer Ninja Crispi, les aliments sont frits sans flamber son prix puisqu’il est en promo à moins de 100 €
item.description: Le Ninja Crispi est un air fryer modulaire avec des récipients en verre trempé pour surveiller la cuisson, qui se retrouve en promo à 99,99 euros sur Carrefour au lieu de 179,99 euros.

item.title: '75% of resumes never reach a human': Here’s the hidden reason your application is getting rejected by AI
item.description: AI-driven hiring systems filter resumes using rigid keywords and formatting rules, causing qualified candidates to be rejected before human review.

item.title: What is the release date for The Testaments episode 5 on Hulu and Disney+?
item.description: The grisly truth about Dr Grove has finally come to light. But when does The Testaments episode 5 drop on Hulu and Disney+?

item.title: 4 unmissable new movies and TV shows to get excited by on Netflix this week (April 19-26)
item.description: From Stranger Things' return to a new survival thriller movie, you won't want to miss this film and TV show quartet.

item.title: Cracks are starting to form on fusion energy’s funding boom
item.description: Fusion startups and investors risk deepening fissures if some key disagreements aren't settled amicably.
